title: Policy: Policy applied - Restart Headset - Settings stay locked
scenario: Policy-locked settings become editable after headset power cycle when policy is applied via Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and select the connected Poly Bluetooth headset.
3. Go to Device Settings and apply a policy that locks specific settings (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer).
4. Verify that the locked settings are grayed out and cannot be changed in the app.
5. Press the Power button on the headset to turn it off.
6. Press the Power button again to turn the headset back on.
7. Wait for the headset to reconnect to the Android device and the Poly Studio Mobile app.
8. Navigate back to Device Settings → Audio Settings → [the locked feature] in the app.
expected: The policy-locked settings remain locked and unchangeable after the headset is powered off and on again.
